# Anivar Aravind

> Engineering leader and standards/policy contributor. Operating in Indian-language computing, fintech, and global commerce since 2003. Long-running independent work on AI governance and corrigibility.

This site is the canonical home for Anivar Aravind's professional record. The single source of truth for roles, projects, recognitions, standards work, and fellowships is `/history/`, which renders from `src/_data/log.json` in the source repository.

## About

- [About](https://anivar.net/about/): Operator career, standards & policy work, and independent collective work.
- [History](https://anivar.net/history/): Year-grouped chronology of roles, projects, standards, and recognitions.
- [Press](https://anivar.net/press/): Recognitions, press contact, and bios at three lengths.
- [Contact](https://anivar.net/contact/): Direct lines for industry, press, and research.
- [Now](https://anivar.net/now/): What is currently active.

## Projects

- [Corrigibility](https://anivar.net/corrigibility/): Framework for systems that can be corrected without being captured. Two papers and a schema repository.
  - Paper I — DPI: [doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18213694](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18213694) (Zenodo · canonical) · mirror at [doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.6059075](https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.6059075) (SSRN)
  - Paper II — EPI: [doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19863649](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19863649) (Zenodo)
- [OpenSLM](https://anivar.net/projects/openslm/): Open Small Models Accord — ten principles for small open models that can be trusted at scale. Drafting at openslm.ai.
- [Indic Project](https://anivar.net/projects/indic-project/): Concluded collective on Indian-language computing (2014–2018).
- [Moving Republic](https://anivar.net/projects/moving-republic/): Civic-tech venture (2006–2012).
- [Swathanthra Malayalam Computing](https://anivar.net/projects/smc/): Indian-language free software collective. Coordinator & Secretary 2007–2014; contributor since 2003.

## Writing

- [Writing](https://anivar.net/writing/): Long-form, published as Layer 8 on Substack.
- [Layer 8](https://thelayer8.substack.com/): The blog.
- [RSS](https://anivar.net/feed.xml): Site feed.

## Reference

- [Accessibility](https://anivar.net/accessibility/): WCAG 2.2 AA conformance statement.
- [Colophon](https://anivar.net/colophon/): How the site is built.
